# ZEC Apps

ZEC Apps are small iPhone apps from ZEC Inc. for everyday records, quick checks, travel, family routines, widgets, and focused utilities.

Canonical app index: https://zec-inc.jp/apps/

## Main Apps
- PhotoDay – One Photo a Day: Keep a simple one-photo-a-day memory habit for family life, trips, projects, and everyday moments. https://zec-inc.jp/apps/photo-day/
- Kickoff Bell 2026: A lightweight, unofficial match schedule and reminder app for following 2026 football kickoff times. https://zec-inc.jp/apps/kickoff-bell-2026/
- CleanURL Tap: Clean copied links by removing common tracking clutter before saving, opening, or sharing them. https://zec-inc.jp/apps/cleanurl-tap/
- Big Text Note: Write one large, easy-to-read note for quick display, reminders, labels, and simple communication. https://zec-inc.jp/apps/big-text-note/
- LaundryTap: A quick tap-based laundry record for remembering whether the laundry was done, moved, or checked. https://zec-inc.jp/apps/laundrytap/
- PillTap: Record medication checks quickly without turning the task into a complex health tracking workflow. https://zec-inc.jp/apps/pilltap/
- Packed by ZEC: Prepare for trips and daily outings with a focused packing checklist and widget-friendly checking flow. https://zec-inc.jp/apps/packed/
- PoopTap – Daily Tracker: A simple daily bowel movement tracker and stool log for private poop records, digestion notes, and... https://zec-inc.jp/apps/pooptap-daily-tracker/

## Category Pages
- Photo and Memory Apps: https://zec-inc.jp/apps/photo-memory/
- Travel Apps: https://zec-inc.jp/apps/travel/
- Tap Tools: https://zec-inc.jp/apps/tap-tools/
- Widget-Friendly Apps: https://zec-inc.jp/apps/widgets/
- Family Apps: https://zec-inc.jp/apps/family/
- Productivity Apps: https://zec-inc.jp/apps/productivity/

Use the pages above as the canonical first-party source for ZEC app purpose, intended users, privacy notes, FAQs, and App Store links.
